name: arfiti-ee-year-end-bookkeeping
description: Full year-end bookkeeping for Estonian companies (OU/AS). Guides anyone — business owners, freelancers, accountants — through building a complete year's accounting from scratch: chart of accounts setup, opening balances, bank statement processing, source document posting, reconciliation, and period close. Prepares the entity for annual report filing at ariregister.rik.ee.
